stemHtml: How is the risk of stalling affected if an aeroplane climbs at constant Mach Number?

options.a: It is unaffected, as the TAS will remain the same.
options.b: It decreases, as the TAS of the aircraft is increasing.
options.c: It increases up to around FL200, and then decreases.
options.d: It increases, as the TAS of the aircraft is decreasing.
